disambiguation: This incident is not a benign autoscaler or CI runner burst because the volume of pod deletions (38 in a short time) is excessive and indicative of malicious intent rather than normal CI operations, which typically do not involve such high deletion rates.
key_evidence: 38 pod_delete events recorded in a short time frame (178 seconds) by the same service account.
The principal 'system:serviceaccount:ci:ci-runner-sa' is associated with a CI runner cohort, indicating potential misuse of CI resources.
All events occurred within the same namespace 'ci', suggesting targeted resource manipulation.
The high novelty score of the principal (up to 1603) indicates unusual behavior for this service account.
likely_intent: Resource hijacking through excessive pod deletions.
recommended_guardrails: Implement rate limiting on pod deletion actions.
Monitor and alert on unusual patterns of resource manipulation by service accounts.
Enforce stricter RBAC policies to limit the actions of CI runner service accounts.
